journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page at / shows a clear 'Start Creating' button visible without scrolling, alongside 'Explore Worlds' and feature descriptions.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js Canvas renders at 2560x1600 at /create with shape/object pickers in a sidebar panel containing Shapes (Cube, Ball, Tube, Cone, Ring), Nature, and Things categories.

journey-ai.evidence: Sparky AI buddy panel opens via button, accepted 'help me' input, and returned a non-empty response ('What would happen if it started snowing here? ❄️') with action buttons.

journey-save.evidence: Save button clicked and confirmed ('Saved!'), page reloaded, and localStorage retains world 'My World' with 1 cube object persisting across reload.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery at /gallery renders a grid showing the saved world card 'My World' by TestKid with Play, Edit, and Delete buttons.
